title: G4MF Mesh Deformation Blend Shape Surface
description: Per-surface blend shape data for a mesh, allowing for normals and texture maps to be deformed.

normal.description: The offset or displacement of the normal direction values for the given surface's `normals.values` accessor. Normals MUST be re-normalized before rendering after applying all blend shapes for a mesh.

surface.description: The index of the surface that this blend shape morph target surface applies to. This index refers to the order of surfaces in the mesh's `surfaces` array.

textureMap.description: The offset or displacement of the texture map's texture space coordinate values for the given surface's `textureMap.values` accessor.
